response.original_title: El paro general de Lima y la huelga de Vitarte
response.overview: It contains images of the city of Lima and the town of Vitarte during the work stoppage of April 10, 1911. It was the first time that the working class adopted the measure of a general strike in solidarity with the workers of the Vitarte textile factory, who were demanding a reduction in the working day and an increase in wages.
response.title: El paro general de Lima y la huelga de Vitarte
